hero.lede: Print and plain dye collections. Decades of textile expertise, fully sustainable premium fabrics, delivered to international markets.

about.p1: Firma Textile is the new venture of an entrepreneur whose textile career began in the 1980s. Decades of expertise, gathered alongside the sector's most respected manufacturers, are woven into every creation.
about.p2: The house prepares print and plain dye collections, in fabrics made from fully sustainable, high-density and high-twist yarns, and delivers them to international markets. The partners behind Firma Textile are creative professionals, each at the top of their field.

collections.heading: Curated. Crafted. Timeless.
collections.sub: A selection from our weaving and printing. Swatches available on request.
collections.note: These images are demo pieces. Our collection details are coming soon.
collections.micro: Full collection & colourways sent on request

contact.heading: Request the collection.
contact.intro: Tell us what you're making and we'll send samples or set up a call. Your Firma agent can also arrange this directly.
